details.shipping_returns: Fast, easy installation with prefabricated sections. Systems expected to last 20+ years in continuous operation. Specific shipping and return details available upon request.
key_features_usps: No moving or rotating components within the tank, allowing for easier operation and maintenance than other mixers or agitators
Preferred and cost-effective for large (10,000+ gallon) or deep (20+ ft) tank applications
Energy efficient with up to 40% energy reductions over other aeration methods
Custom mixing analyses using computational fluid dynamics (CFD) modeling software
Expected lifespan of 20+ years in continuous operation with corrosion resistant materials
applications_use_cases: Wastewater treatment - equalization tanks, storm holding tanks, sludge mixing, aerobic and anaerobic digesters
Mining - mixing phosphoric acid tanks for solids suspension
Oil and Petrochemical - recirculating basic sediment and water within crude oil storage tanks, blending fuel oil tanks
Food and Agriculture - corn wet milling and processing, beverage blending
Chemical Manufacturing - blending for chemical reactions and synthesis, pH control, gas dispersion
Pulp and Paper - waste tanks and leachate tanks

technical_specifications.Connection_Types: Flanged connections, welded connections, Victaulic connections
technical_specifications.System_Components: Mixing manifolds with entrainment openings on jet nozzles, recirculation pumps
technical_specifications.Operating_Principle: Eductor principle with no moving parts within tank
technical_specifications.Design_Configurations: Directional Mix Jet Mixers, Bidirectional Mix Jet Mixers, Eddy Jet Mixers, Hydraulic Sludge Mixers
technical_specifications.Materials_of_Construction: Fiberglass reinforced plastic (FRP), 316 stainless steel, 440 stainless steel, duplex stainless steel, high chrome stainless steel
